subject: end november
body:
hi Jeffrey,
Ehud asked me to follow up on your email concerning Palm Beach.

Do you mean november? There are only 30 days. 

We would like very much to join the company, but I am not sure that we are OK with the timetable. Hereunder - ours: 

We intend to come back to NY on Tuesday, November 24.
December 1 there is an event in NY - the Washington Institute is honoring Ehud.
December 2 we fly to Boka Raton and the same evening Ehud speaks
December 3 we fly to Nice via Munich for The Cercle in Monaco.
December 6 - back to Tel Aviv
Do you think it can be done?

We return to NY on December 25 for a longer period.

Nili
